name: visionary_architect
snapshot: Month X · Favorable energy. Clarity and momentum are aligned, but rush can morph into pressure.
insight: When direction and energy run together, progress feels natural, yet the urge to keep accelerating can quietly undermine your balance. Rhythm, not relentless speed, sustains the meaningful growth you seek.
guidance: ✅ Pause today to revisit why this matters, so each action stays purposeful.
✅ Build a short reflection window to adjust pace instead of forcing another task.
⏸️ If hesitant: Ask yourself, 'Am I chasing the goal, or just filling the calendar?'
micro_action: Spend ten minutes pausing and checking whether your direction still feels right.
nudge: Avoid filling every minute with tasks; progress isn't measured by busyness.

name: kinetic_fog
snapshot: High energy is present, but the path ahead feels foggy.
insight: It's like charging through a rainstorm—the power is there, but visibility is low. The best way out of the fog is to choose one direction and focus your momentum, rather than chasing every new spark.
guidance: ✅ Pick one idea and devote one focused block of time to it today.
✅ Ignore every new distraction for 30 minutes and see what that clarity brings.
⏸️ If hesitant: Ask, 'Which of these ideas am I still excited enough to stick with?'
micro_action: Choose one spark and spend 30 focused minutes on it—no multitasking.
nudge: Energy without direction exhausts you. Channel it into one line of work before opening the next.

name: rogue_engine
snapshot: You're pushing hard, but the effort's weight is clear.
insight: Ambition fuels you, but when drive loses alignment, the same push becomes pressure. You may accomplish a lot yet feel the impact missing its mark.
guidance: ✅ Pause a task and ask, 'Is this high-value or just urgent?'
✅ Recalibrate your goals with your values so the work stays meaningful.
⏸️ If hesitant: Ask, 'Am I pressured by the task, or by my identity as a doer?'
micro_action: Today, say no to one busy-but-empty request so you can focus on your priority.
nudge: More effort isn't always the answer—let alignment guide the next move.

name: harmonious_drifter
snapshot: Energy is muted and slow; clarity feels blurry.
insight: This quiet phase isn't failure—it's a shift. You've outgrown previous goals but haven't found the next destination yet.
guidance: ✅ Give yourself time and pick one meaningful small action to reconnect.
✅ Tune into supportive relationships; you don't have to decide immediately.
⏸️ If hesitant: Ask, 'Am I rushing to decide just to escape uncertainty?'
micro_action: Write down three things that still feel meaningful, then breathe through each one.
nudge: Avoid forcing fast decisions; let clarity surface at its own pace.

name: deep_observer
snapshot: You understand your life, but action lags behind thought.
insight: Reflection brings depth but can breed hesitation. The smallest imperfect move often turns insight into progress.
guidance: ✅ Choose one idea you've considered and spend 15 minutes on it.
✅ Treat action as an experiment, not a final answer.
⏸️ If hesitant: Ask, 'Am I waiting for perfect clarity instead of creating it?'
micro_action: Act on a planned idea for 15 minutes—progress beats perfection.
nudge: Waiting for certainty often creates delay. Launch a tiny test instead.

name: burnedout_sage
snapshot: You hold clarity, yet your body feels drained.
insight: High insight with depleted energy is the burned-out sage. You're wise about what should happen, but the fuel to execute is low. A little renewal keeps clarity from turning into fatigue.
guidance: ✅ Schedule a gentle pause rather than forcing another decision.
✅ Add a small restorative ritual to reclaim energy without breaking your current balance.
⏸️ If hesitant: Ask, 'Is pushing through worth the energy cost, or is rest the wiser move?'
micro_action: Take a 10-minute restorative break—walk, breathe, hydrate.
nudge: Rest is not defeat; it keeps the clarity you have actionable later.

name: kinetic_fog
snapshot: Your vitality is strong but the direction is scattered.
insight: It's like powering through a storm—your engine works, but visibility is poor. Focus the surge on one direction; without it, you spread energy thin and feel frustrated.
guidance: ✅ Commit to one idea for a short focus session.
✅ Create a 'today's focus' window so attention sticks.
⏸️ If hesitant: Ask, 'Which idea keeps pulling me back even when distractions arrive?'
micro_action: Pick one high-energy idea and devote 30 distraction-free minutes to it.
nudge: Avoid chasing every spark—direction amplifies momentum more than constant restarts.

name: hibernator
snapshot: Energy is low; the system requests downtime.
insight: Fatigue isn't weakness—it's a signal to restore. Move gently; recovery brings clarity back naturally.
guidance: ✅ Allow today to be restorative, even if it feels unproductive.
✅ Let go of a task list and focus on simple nourishment.
⏸️ If hesitant: Ask, 'Am I forcing productivity out of guilt, or honoring my need to rest?'
micro_action: Give yourself 20 minutes of true rest—no screens, no tasks.
nudge: Rest is strategic; when energy returns, action will feel lighter.
